arts.ttl: Brighton need a lot more to secure transfer – Crystal Palace, Fulham and Sheffield United remain in the lead
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion will need to significantly up their bid for Terry Yegbe, with Crystal Palace, Fulham and Sheffield United still in the lead for him. That’s according to Fotboll Direkt, who dispel reports emerging from Ghana regarding the defender and insist Brighton are not close to winning the race for him.
